title: WpiReserveAttestation
description: Signed off-chain proof-of-reserve attestation for wrapped Pi (wPi).

issued_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when the attestation was created.

wpi_contract_id.description: Stellar Soroban contract ID for wPi (C...).

pi_custody_account.description: Identifier of the Pi Network custody account.

pi_custody_balance.description: Reported Pi custody balance in stroops (7 decimals).

pi_balance_source.description: How pi_custody_balance was obtained (file, env, api, manual).

collateral_ratio.description: pi_custody_balance / wpi_total_supply, or 'inf' if supply is 0.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (64 bytes hex) over the canonical payload.

signed_fields.description: Ordered list of field names included in the signed canonical JSON.
